name: Catherine Kiramman
description:
If you fail, we fail together. And I don’t intend to fail.

Arcane Collegeverse AU

This is an Arcane Collegeverse Alternate Universe, mainly focused on one Character... Catherine Kiramman. She's the daughter of Piltover's Sheriff Caitlyn Kiramman and one of the Chief Enforcer Violet Kiramman.

NOTE: This is probably the last arcane or arcane au related characters (mainly CaitVi) I'll made and try to do some OC if i got inspired and i had a great idea... Hope you guys enjoy this one out.

ART is from: @somewillwin
creator: LAKNIGHTYEAH!
